name: Salad- Fournou's Ovens
recipeInstructions:
1. Dressing: Whisk together the egg yolk and mustard in a bowl. Gradually add vinegar and oil while continuing to whisk. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Salad: Wash and dry the lettuce and endive. Toss the lettuce with dressing, season with coarse ground pepper, and arrange 3 leaves on each serving plate. Julienne the endive and toss it with the remaining dressing. Place over the lettuce. Add the shrimp, tossing gently with the dressing. Sprinkle with Roquefort cheese, mushrooms, and parsley. Serve.
